tool_input.description: Explore Photoshop Plans page CTAs
tool_input.prompt:
Explore the codebase at /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee to find:
1. The Photoshop Plans page files (look for photoshop, plans page related files)
2. Any CTA (Call-to-Action) elements - buttons, links with text like "Buy now", "Start free trial", "Get started", etc.
3. Related CSS/style files

Look in:
- nala/ directory
- libs/ or blocks/ directories
- Any page files related to photoshop plans

Return file paths, relevant code snippets showing CTAs, and line numbers.

tool_input.content:
# Plan: Remove CTAs from Photoshop Plans page ## Task Description Remove all Call-to-Action (CTA) elements from the Photoshop Plans card templates in the plans test/demo HTML page. CTAs are `
` wrappers containing `Buy now` elements. Two Photoshop card templates are affected: `#photoshop` and `#photoshop-with-addon`. ## Relevant Files - `web-components/test/merch-card.plans.test.html` — Primary file. Contains templates `#photoshop` (line 62-73) and `#photoshop-with-addon` (line 141-151), each with a `
` CTA block to remove. No CSS or JS changes required: the `slot="footer"` style rules in `plans.css.js` are shared across all plan variants and must not be removed. No test logic references the CTA content specifically. ## Step by Step Tasks ### 1. Remove CTA from `#photoshop` template - In `web-components/test/merch-card.plans.test.html`, locate template `id="photoshop"` (starts at line 25) - Delete the entire `
...
` block (lines 62–73) that contains the `Buy now` anchor - Ensure the closing `` tag remains intact after removal ### 2. Remove CTA from `#photoshop-with-addon` template - In the same file, locate template `id="photoshop-with-addon"` (starts at line 82) - Delete the entire `
...
` block (lines 141–151) that contains the identical `Buy now` anchor - Ensure the closing `` tag remains intact after removal ### 3. Verify markup validity - Confirm no unclosed tags or dangling attributes remain in either template after the deletions - Run `node --check` is not applicable for HTML; visually verify template structure is intact ## Acceptance Criteria - The `#photoshop` template renders a plans card with no CTA in its footer slot - The `#photoshop-with-addon` template renders a plans card with no CTA in its footer slot - All existing tests in `merch-card.plans.test.html` still pass (none test the CTA content directly) - No unused imports, variables, or CSS rules are introduced or left behind - The `
` wrapper and its child anchor are fully removed from both templates ## Validation Commands - `node --check web-components/test/merch-card.plans.test.html` — not applicable (HTML file) - Manual: confirm both photoshop templates have no `slot="footer"` div after editing
